justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to update the deprecated @SpringApplicationConfiguration annotation to @SpringBootTest in the test class, leaving a broken test setup. While it updates java.version to 21, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (like records or pattern matching) and retains legacy patterns like @RequestMapping replacements which are correct but not Java 21 specific.
